author: SantiMod
content:
⛔️⛔️⛔️IMPORTANT INFORMATION⛔️⛔️⛔️

 Any poster/asset that is in either an OPEN order, UNCLAIMED, or UNSETTLED status on the dex/inventory will NOT be counted in the snapshot.

  For the snapshot, the posters should be in your wallet and not for sale on the Atlas site and other dex sites (Like serum)

 You have to claim it and take it to your wallet, this must be done before the snapshot. If you did not claim, you won't receive the rewards for that poster!

(Reminder that the snapshot will take place on August 25)
